mapper.select: SELECT us_num, us_id, us_pw, us_nickname, us_email, us_authority, us_created FROM user WHERE us_id = #{username}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user ( us_id, us_pw, us_nickname, us_email, us_authority, us_created ) VALUES ( #{us_id}, #{us_pw}, #{us_nickname}, #{us_email}, #{us_authority}, NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT us_num, us_id, us_pw, us_nickname, us_email, us_authority, us_created FROM user WHERE us_num = #{us_num}
